description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a classic skate shoe silhouette, featuring a combination of navy blue and light blue panels. The upper is constructed from canvas and suede materials, with a white leather wave accent running along the side. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets and a padded collar for comfort. The midsole is white with a black stripe, and the outsole is made of durable rubber, typical for urban footwear. The heel features a small branded patch, and the overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for everyday wear in urban environments.
description: A navy and light blue low-top sneaker with white laces, a white side stripe, and a white rubber sole, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces, and the navy blue toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white leather wave accent, light blue side panel, and the full profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar, heel patch, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the white side stripe and the color-blocked panels.
attribute_logo: Red rectangular patch with white text on the heel.
